overview: Verve Health offers evidence-based personalized medicine focused on hormone optimization, weight loss, and aesthetic treatments. They serve Central Oregon through in-person care at their Bend location and telehealth across Arizona, Oregon, and Washington.
highlights: Bioidentical hormone replacement therapy (BHRT) with partner compounding pharmacies
GLP-1 weight loss with Semaglutide and Tirzepatide
targetAudience: Individuals seeking hormone optimization, weight loss support, and age-management medicine.
